programme.desc: Millions of people around the world claim to have had an encounter with a creature unlike any recognized by mainstream science such as the Mothman, Chupacabra, and Mongolian Death Worm.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Stories of those who lead double lives are both daring and baffling; a look at what compels a person to attempt to become someone else and when the line between impersonation and transformation becomes blurred.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: King Arthur, England's first pop culture superhero; his exploits inspired blockbuster movies and television series like "Middle Earth", "Harry Potter", "Game of Thrones" and "Star Wars"; the significant impact of Arthurian legend on Western culture.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: The question of the identity of Jack the Ripper has baffled police investigators, historians, and armchair detectives for over a century, even with media offering its own unique take on the killer's identity.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Examining some of the most devastating plagues in human history, as well the scientific advances to combat these diseases, including the development of Edward Jenner's vaccine for smallpox in the 1790s.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A voodoo princess and her henchmen will stop at nothing to possess an ancient crown being held at a private vault company.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A dying millionaire (Richard Basehart) rescues a badly wounded undercover police officer and gives him a new identity.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael Knight, fully healed, seeks revenge on the electronics-industry saboteurs who killed his partner.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael helps an Army officer (Devon Ericson) investigate her colonel father's strange death.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Rick's convent-schooled sister vanishes after dragging reluctant chaperon Magnum to a dive.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum aids two vaudevillians (Martha Scott, Mildred Natwick) whose shabby retirement hotel is slated to be sold.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Higgins meets a secret love (Jane Merrow) when he saves the English noblewoman from abductors, but she prefers Magnum.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum and Higgins' stay at Robin's Nest depends on a softball game against a tycoon's (Dick Shawn) team.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: After injuring a boxer with the Ferrari, TC feels obligated to take the man's place in a bare-knuckles bout.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Saigon's most popular disc jockey (Gretchen Corbett) is threatened while in Honolulu looking for her ex-fiance.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett vows to expose a debt-ridden judge (Bill Russell) who asked his basketball-star son to throw a game.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Someone shadows Crockett while he and Tubbs work with a government agent to set up a reclusive drug smuggler (Frank Zappa).

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When assassins kidnap a Latin American activist's daughter, Crockett and Tubbs face a dilemma; guest Bianca Jagger.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A smuggler (Gary Cole) helps Crockett and Tubbs find pirates who commandeer contraband-laden vessels.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Angelyne warns former lover Tubbs of a bounty put on his head by the son of dead drug-kingpin Calderone; guest Lee Iacocca.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A zealous Scotland Yard inspector labels Gina's new love (Liam Neeson) a soldier of the Irish Republican Army.

programme.title: Quincy, M.E.
programme.desc: A wealthy attorney uses the law to evade punishment for killing a pedestrian while driving drunk, but Quincy suspects a cover-up.

programme.title: Quincy, M.E.
programme.desc: A mute boy witnesses the murder of the owner of an equestrian ranch for disabled children; guest Luke Askew.

programme.title: Quincy, M.E.
programme.desc: Quincy is inspired by a woman (Tyne Daly) dying of cancer when he fills in for an ailing doctor who deals with the terminally ill.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: A court-appointed receiver (Mariette Hartley) tries to collect $35,000 from Rockford; guest Leif Erickson.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Rockford poses as a jet-setter when a princess employs him to protect her socialite friend from a hired killer.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Even more daring attempts are made on the life of the socialite whom Rockford has been hired to protect.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: A rocker (Kristoffer Tabori) whose music is being bootlegged hires Rockford to find his producer.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Rockford finds a rocker's (Kristoffer Tabori) producer and uncovers a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: An old flame rekindles when a woman (Kathryn Harrold) asks Rockford to find her vanished fiance; guest Barbara Mandrell.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Beamer (James Whitmore Jr.), White (Tom Selleck) and Rockford probe a murder at a P.I. awards dinner; guest Larry Manetti.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A detective (Harry Guardino) hides his terminal illness while pursuing his partner's murderer; guests Joanne Linville, Jed Allan.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A psychologist (Sian Barbara Allen) asks Kojak's help to find her avenging fiance, an armed parolee; guest (Paul) Michael Glaser.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Kojak poses as a chemist to capture thieves trying to peddle morphine back to the insurance company; guest Ed Lauter.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A psychopathic bomber (Steven Keats) helps his friends by murdering people who hurt them; guests Elizabeth Allen, Dabney Coleman.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A man asks Kojak to locate his missing father; the case leads to a thief who fled to Brazil with $25 million; guest John Hillerman.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: Shipped to Louisiana, mummy Kharis (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists (Dick Foran, Wallace Ford) defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: An old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls the mummy Kharis (Lon Chaney), now at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After seeing T.I. on the set of a popular television series, Domani is convinced acting is easy. Wanting to teach his young son a lesson prompts T.I. to encourage his children to make their own movie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After catching his family eating junk food, Tip decides it's time for them to get in shape! With money on the line, Tameka, Shekinah and the kids are put to the test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip notices the kids are missing out on certain skills he got from his old neighborhood. Trying to toughen them up, they hit the boxing gym where Major tries to take on his older brother. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After King's pet hamster passes away, the kids beg their dad for a dog. When Tameka makes an interesting offer on behalf of the children, Tip puts the kids through a test to see if they are responsible enough for a dog. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Finally fed up with being overweight and out of shape, Shekinah goes under the knife. Meanwhile, Tip wants to take the family to New Orleans to shoot a music video for his newest single with Lil' Wayne. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Trying to teach the kids business skills, Tip and Nelly help them come up with a plan. But when things start falling apart, one kid proves he's got Tip's knack for hustling and might just save the day. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: It's the battle of generations as Tameka and Niq Niq face off in a competition to see who's the better dancer. Meanwhile, Tip takes the kids to a skate park in an effort to teach Domani how to face his fears. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: As Major's first day of pre-school approaches, Auntie Precious feels like it's time to move on. Tameka isn't quite ready to let her leave the Harris home and devises a plan to keep her around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After Shekinah acts unprofessional during the taping of Tameka's talk show pilot, Tameka worries Shekinah's attitude could jeopardize her hustle. Tameka insists she spend time with an etiquette coach but will it be enough? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Domani is hired for his first paid gig but when he tells Tip he's intimidated by him, Tip has to decide whether or not to go to Domani's performance. Meanwhile, Tameka takes the kids horseback riding but Major is nervous. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Tip's probation coming to a close, it's time to go full hustle on promoting his new album with a big celebration bash. Tameka takes King to a meeting for his own pajama line, but the two have some creative differences. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Christmas around the corner, the kids are making their lists and checking them twice. But as the Christmas list grows, T.I.¹s concerned the kids don¹t know how much work goes into paying for their gifts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After the release of his most recent album, T.I. decides to pack up and take the family on a winter adventure. But new to the ski slopes anything could happen with this family as they try to tackle the mountains of Big Bear, CA. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Major is becoming a little man and it's time for him to get his own bed. King struggles with understanding the difference between the reality of his own life and the allure of his dad's. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah tells Tameka raising kids isn't hard, Tameka challenges her to take care of the Harris children for a day. Meanwhile, Tip and Tameka use the opportunity to step out and have fun. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Spring Break around the corner, Tameka convinces Tip to take the family to the West Coast for a beach vacation. Meanwhile, a controversial love letter is found in King's backpack causing the entire family to weigh in. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah is trying to move up in the hair industry and hopes a booth at the world famous Bronner Bros. hair show will help take her there. With Tip and Tameka out of town, will Shekinah be able to keep it classy? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip sees Major spending more time with his video games than his friends, Tip decides to set up a play date. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Major asks Tip to be in his new music video for his single "Hello" with CeeLo Green, Tip decides to incorporate the entire family. Will the kids be up to the challenge?

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Messiah turning thirteen and entering into young adulthood, Tip encourages Messiah to go on his very first date. But in typical Harris family fashion, going solo is a no-no, so the whole family comes along for the ride. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip finds an incriminating text on Niq Niq's phone, he sets out with Major to get to the bottom of things. Later, Tameka encourages Shekinah to join an improv group and sends the funniest person she knows to join her, King. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka's brother Lil' Red stops by the house and asks King to join his grandfather's group, The Tams for a night. Meanwhile, Tip joins Deyjah in a baking class to perfect the homemade cupcake.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah moves into her new home, Tameka convinces her she needs home owner's boot camp. Back at the house, Tip is discouraged by his kids' lack of basketball skills and sets up a game with NBA star Josh Smith. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Fed up with Shekinah always saying she wants to be white, Tameka suggests they spend the day doing things white people do. Meanwhile, Tip discovers inappropriate pictures on his kids' social media accounts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After attending their first NASCAR event, Tip and Tameka argue over who's the better driver. With each of their personal cars on the line, the whole family joins in on the competition. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: King, Major, and Precious are hired for their first paid gig at the circus. Under pressure, will the kids step up to the challenge? Meanwhile, Messiah and Domani try to use Tip's know how to start their own fashion line. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to make a unique workout video for people who don't like to work out. Meanwhile, Tip takes the boys to LA for some business and pleasure. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Russell Simmons stops by the Harris home he and Domani hit it off. With Niq Niq getting ready to leave the nest Tameka is having a hard time letting go and arranges a day for their friends to spend together to give them life advice. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is ready to explode through your TV with a double dose of twin-tastic action, as the Tonga Twins lock up against the devilishly dangerous Miami Sweet Heat in the Tag Team Tournament Finals!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw take on The Tonga Twins and Miami's very own Sweet Heat in unbelievable Triple Threat Tag Team elimination action! BK Rhythm and Glitch the Gamer team up to take on the troubled team of Kandi Krush and Keta Rush!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tormenta & Wrecking Ball team up to take on Princess Aussie & Leia Makoa in can't miss tag team action! The Fabulous Lana Star accompanies Penelope Pink as she goes up against the formidable Jessie Jones!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kandi Krush learns who destroyed her beloved grandmother's boxing gloves and she wishes to settle the score – but David McLane has other ideas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The night of action kicks off with a tag team showdown between Coach Campanelli & Randi Rah Rah and Gigi Gianni & Adriana Gambino whose drama will surprise fans before the bell ever sounds!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Last week we learned in an exclusive interview with David McLane that The Beast has thrown her crutches to the side – and that her ankle rehab is over! With the crutches pushed aside, The Beast will return to WOW in the coming weeks...

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After finding the boxing gloves her grandmother gave her ripped to shreds, Kandi Krush has been on a rampage to get her hands on Chainsaw and must encounter Holidead and Voodoo on her way.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Exile is reintroduced after a mysterious time away. Is GiGi Gianni really ready to face a veteran opponent like the timeless Alpha Malia Hosaka all on her own?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast returns to the ring for the first time since her leg injury and leaves the audience in utter shock. After a run-in backstage, Leia Makoa and Tiki Chamorro have a score to settle with the Fabulous Four.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight marks the debut of a brand new WOW Superhero! Our very first Gen Z competitor - Jennifer Florez. Sahara Spars is eager to show she has what it takes to become the next top contender at WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With The Beast relinquishing her championship title due to injury, David McLane announces how WOW will determine the new World Champion.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The mother-daughter duo of Holly Swag and Big Rig Betty has everybody talking! Tonight they get a surprising shot at the WOW Tag Team Championships in the main event against Tag Team Champions Miami's Sweet Heat, Lindsey and Laurie Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, The Tonga Twins seek to even the odds as they face Exodus and Genesis of Team Exile in the main event of WOW!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Bart does a good deed for two exhausted travelers he meets in the desert, his horse is stolen and he is framed for a murder.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: A respected San Francisco businessman, who's really a gentleman thief and notorious swindler, beats up Bart, takes his cash and leaves him in the hold of an outbound cargo ship.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart has trouble telling the good guys from the bad when he and Samantha team up to recover stolen treasury plates.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Adam Kirby witnesses a murder in the livery stable; then makes the mistake of 'shooting off his mouth about it, leading to the killer coming after him. Sheriff Hollister 'baits' a trap with Kirby and waits...to trap the killer and save Kirby.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal is ambushed while bringing in outlaw Kyle Dodge he turns his captive over to Sheriff Hollister just before he dies, with the cryptic warning 'Trust nobody.' Forewarned, the Sheriff forestalls a clever attempt to free Dodge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: In order to trap an outlaw gang, the Epitaph reports that a gang member is turning the state's witness. The outlaw dies of his wounds, but his death is kept secret. In a bold move, the gang kidnaps Claibourne and offers to exchange him for the outlaw.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The Editor witnesses a murder, identifying Vic Reel as the killer. Hollister arrests Reel, but before the trial, gang leader Jason Douglas sends 'triggers' to kill Claibourne, setting the stage for a big shootout in the streets of Tombstone.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Rancher Bert Magraw returns from Denver with his young bride Jeannie. The same day, notorious gunslinger Vince Sanders arrives in town and baits Magraw into a gunfight. Sheriff Hollister steps in to save Magraw's life and uncover a conspiracy.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of slugging and robbing a miner, Renee Carter is being taken to Yuma prison. When the miner dies, she must return for trial, but Hollister believes she is covering up for a gambler, Frank Fallon, who will try to prevent her return.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Returning to Tombstone with lawyer Gay Monahan, Hollister is just in time to prevent a gunfight between mine owner Big Jim Gerson and his manager, Feeny Spindler. Spindler hires the lady lawyer who digs up some surprising facts and a frozen body.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister investigates a series of mysterious deaths among the silver miners and links Lily Murdock, the town's most respected woman, with the tragedies. Lily is so well-liked by the townspeople that the sheriff dares not accuse her openly.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Marshal Vern Fawcett turns in his badge after accidentally shooting an outlaw in the back. When Holcomb's three vengeful brothers ride into Tombstone, Sheriff Hollister helps Fawcett regain his courage for the fight against lawlessness.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister rushes a young, wounded hoodlum to Tombstone's hospital, putting him under the care of nurse Mary Rice. But when the notorious Gayleyville gang kidnaps her and the dying boy, Hollister and the wounded man each attempt to save the nurse.

programme.title: Have Gun - Will Travel

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus's Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba's soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey searches for the card that permits him to enter the final battle, not realizing Bandit Keith has stolen it. As he struggles to accept the fact that Serenity will be blind forever, he receives help from a new friend!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Bandit Keith's Machine deck forces Joey to take the defensive, Joey mimics Keith's battle strategy to metalize his Red-Eyes Black Dragon! Is victory assured, or does the cheater Bandit Keith literally have one last card up his sleeve?
